statement: In every magma, Equation 2788 (`x = ((y * z) * (y * x)) * y`) implies Equation 3030 (`x = ((y * (z * w)) * y) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0484
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op y x)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z w)) y) y)
